TYPES.FPCLINE: types : tt_item TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_item.
types :tt_conditions TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_conditions,
types: tt_mat_desc TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF t_mat_desc.

INITIALIZATION.FPCLINE: lv_lines type STANDARd TABLE of tline,
lv_lines1 type STANDARd TABLE of tline,
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
READ TABLE lv_lines INTO LINES INDEX 1.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* CONCATENATE policy_no lv_data-tdline INTO policy_no SEPARATED BY ' '.
READ TABLE gt_item INTO ls_item INDEX 1.
* Ftech info for Mode Of Transport
*DATA: lv_lines TYPE STANDARD TABlE OF tline,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* LV_LATRS CA ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ ' ' OR LV_LATRS EQ SPACE OR
* CONCATENATE LV_LINE LV_LATRS1 INTO LV_LINE SEPARATED BY ' '.
* "CONCATENATE gv_span wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_span SEPARATED BY space.
* CONCATENATE gv_span wa_lines-tdline INTO gv_span SEPARATED BY space.
DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM GT_ITEM COMPARING VBELN.
delete ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_items COMPARING venum.
it_lines type STANDARD TABLE OF tline.
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
* READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 1.
* READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 2.
* READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 3.
* READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 4.
* READ TABLE it_lines INTO wa_lines INDEX 5.
READ TABLE it_vehicle INTO wa_vehicle INDEX 1.
READ TABLE it_vehicle INTO wa_vehicle INDEX 2.
READ TABLE it_vehicle INTO wa_vehicle INDEX 3.
READ TABLE it_vehicle INTO wa_vehicle INDEX 4.
READ TABLE it_vehicle INTO wa_vehicle INDEX 5.
MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
CONCATENATE gv_tcs_wrd 'Only' INTO gv_tcs_wrd SEPARATED BY ' '.
SELECT SINGLE bstkd INTO purch_no FROM vbkd WHERE vbeln =
lv_ft_text = 'Regd Office: B Cube Building, Bavdhan, Opp. Bavdhan Police Station,Pune- 411 021'.
lv_ft_text = 'Regd. Office : 8 Dhanashree Apartment, Survey No. 133/1-2, Off ITI Road, Aundh, Pune - 411 007 (INDIA)CIN'.
lv_ft_text = 'Regd. Office : Row House No.101/102,Survey No. 54/3/4, Near Garden, Wadgaon Budruk Pune 411041 (India)'.

FORMS.FPCLINE: DATA : TEXT_LINES TYPE TABLE OF TLINE,
** MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
